message:
refactor(cli): DST helper dedup, lint fixes, and new create e2e tests

Deduplicate DST helpers: move local_to_utc()/local_to_utc_opt() above
first call site, replacing 5 duplicate inline DST blocks with calls to
these shared helpers.

Improve compute_jsonl_hash() to use .trim() and skip empty lines for
whitespace resilience, with a new test.

Restructure sync merge_issue() if-let chain for readability (positive
condition first). Apply map_or_else lint fix in sync staleness check.

Simplify doctor check_integrity() return type from Result<()> to ()
since it never errors. Flatten nested if blocks into single if with
let-chains for epic safeguard in close.rs. Rename variable from
`resolved` to `resolved_dep` for clarity in create.rs. Add
#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to ready execute_inner().

Add e2e tests for create command: TOON output decoding and
--file --silent output verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ pub fn execute_with_storage(
     execute_inner(args, cli, outer_ctx, beads_dir, Some(storage))
 }
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
 fn execute_inner(
     args: &ReadyArgs,
     cli: &config::CliOverrides,
